creator: arachna@distasis.com
text:
On Thu, 17 Dec 2009 20:11:04 +0100
 Johann Kois <j.kois@freebsd.org> wrote:
 
 > The provided URL (http://pbclug.org) is dead and it seems is has been so for a 
 > while (Google was not able to re-index this page since 31-Oct-2009, for 
 > example).
 
 
 They're working with the hosting company on getting it back up.  You can use the URL link directly to the mailing list instead at:
 http://groups.yahoo.com/group/pbclinux
 
 Thanks.
